activities.title: Persist Rollout Items
controls: JSONL format (one record per line, tagged-union)

activities.title: Filter Persisted Items
outputs: filtered Vec<RolloutItem> reaches disk; rest pass only through in-memory event stream

activities.title: Emit OTel Spans + Metrics
outputs: OTel spans + counter/gauge/timer metrics → external collector

activities.title: Emit Analytics Events
inputs: client-side facts: compaction events, app invocations, turn submissions, subagent thread starts, hook runs
outputs: analytics events shipped to backend over separate channel

activities.title: Conditionally Emit Attestation Header
outputs: x-oai-attestation HTTP/WS header (when provider returns Some)

activities.title: Propagate W3C Trace Context
controls: WS path: traceparent + tracestate in client_metadata via response_create_client_metadata (Ch08 C6)
outputs: traceparent/tracestate keys appended to WS client_metadata when context present
